docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CONTINENTAL CORPORATION ASSIGNEE STATEWIDE CREDIT AND COLLECTION BUREAU INC AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, GLADYS LARA, JULIO
